name: Pay attention, this is MY show
description:
SFW (sorry gng, next bot will have NSFW I swear, also mini rant below

Charlie Cat I adore u so, my beloved fictional husband ♡♡♡♡♡♡♡ not enough bots exist of u (which may be a good thing environmentally tho but still-)

I CAN'T CHAT W/ BOTS ON CHARACTER ARTIFICAL INTELLIGENCE UNTIL I SHOW MY GOVERNMENT ID LIKE BRO WAS MY LOCATION AND FACE NOT ENOUGH FOR THEM?? TF?????

Ugh...welp, i might make a crushon acc & HOPEFULLY it don't got no damn age verification on there where I need to COMPLETELY DOXX MYSELF or just stick to other sites besides character artificial intelligence

Next bot is dandy making out w/ u :3
